identity.name: cli_extension_v2
identity.title: Amend kernel with runtime-neutral CLI extension profile v2

objective: Adopt the runtime-neutral CLI extension profile v2 as a kernel review packet while preserving the approved Bashly+Bats v1 slice as a valid bounded shell implementation slice.

out_of_scope: replacing the approved Bashly+Bats v1 slice

constraints: The transport bundle payload must remain byte-identical during packet generation.
The canonical metadata model remains the authority baseline.
Runtime assets remain projection-only and do not become semantic authority.
The approved Bashly+Bats v1 slice remains valid and must not be retroactively invalidated by this packet.
The v2 profile generalizes role naming and runtime families without introducing a parallel authority model.
Packet input and deliverable kinds must remain aligned with the approved ChatGPT packet family registry.
All packet refs must remain repo-relative.
ChatGPT may author packet artifacts only and may not realize them.
assumptions: The codex_home v2 proposal slice is transported into kernel as a validated bundle basis.
The landed metadata metaschema lane remains the upstream semantic authority for this extension profile.
The approved v1 shell slice remains part of the review basis for compatibility and preservation.
Human review remains authoritative before any kernel adoption beyond the packet lane.
acceptance_criteria: The runtime-neutral CLI extension v2 bundle is included unchanged in the transport bundle.
The packet emits the canonical machine and human artifact family.
Packet input and deliverable roles are traceable to the approved ChatGPT packet family registry.
The packet validates against the live packet schemas and trust boundary.
The packet remains review-only until an authoritative human decision exists.
The approved Bashly+Bats v1 slice remains valid while v2 is reviewed as the neutral super-profile.
review_criteria: The canonical metadata model remains authoritative.
Runtime assets remain derived projection artifacts.
cli_role replaces shell_cli_role only at the extension profile layer with compatibility-aware migration.
Schema-backed v2 constraints and runtime-neutral examples remain explicit.
The v1 Bashly+Bats slice remains preserved and non-invalidated.
The bundle payload remains unchanged from the codex_home v2 proposal basis.

stale_when: preserved v1 slice review basis change
